title: Treat external intent evidence as reconstructable cache
goal: Implement #536 by making ordinary GitHub external intent refresh produce ignored reconstructable cache state rather than checked-in full-history snapshots.
Prevent previous state=all audit scope from becoming the default refresh scope.
non_goals: Do not remove provider-agnostic reconciliation behavior.
Do not make GitHub required for the core package.
Do not implement #537, #538, #539, or #540 in this slice.

intent.outcome: external work evidence is cache-like and reconstructable by default
intent.constraints: host-agnostic core, GitHub optional adapter, offline fallback remains readable
intent.latitude: may alter refresh command defaults, cache path, ignore rules, tests, inventory, and repo evidence state
intent.escalation: stop if ordinary summary/reconcile must require network access

execution.proof: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q (207 passed); uv run ruff check src tests (passed); uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json (review-ready); cd packages/planning; uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py (151 passed); cd packages/planning; uv run ruff check . (passed); uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json (healthy); uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success (passed); uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py (passed); uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success (passed)

invariants: checked-in planning state stores routing decisions, not raw external issue mirrors
missing gh produces a clear optional-adapter failure path

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: stop checking in reconstructable artifact residue

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: external intent refresh no longer makes tracked snapshots the easy path

intent_interpretation.literal request: Finish the current reconstructable-artifact lane, then stop.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: complete the active product-shape compression lane without switching to new review findings
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: implement #536 as the next lane slice
intent_interpretation.review guidance: verify default behavior is cache/local and explicit writes remain opt-in

execution_bounds.allowed paths: external intent refresh/read paths, tests, inventory, planning state, ignore rules
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_workspace_summary_cli.py tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run ruff check src tests; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: broad planning package extraction or mandatory network reconciliation

stop_conditions.stop when: ordinary refresh writes ignored cache and tracked snapshot is removed

context_budget.live working set: issue #536, external intent refresh functions/tests, summary/reconcile evidence loading
context_budget.tiny resumability note: finish #536 cache path and refresh defaults
context_budget.context-shift triggers: before commit or after validation failure

delegated_judgment.hard constraints: do not edit, keep package host-agnostic
delegated_judgment.escalate when: recommendation requires mandatory GitHub in core

immediate_next_action: Move default refresh writes to an ignored cache path and update tests.
invariants: No GitHub requirement in core package behavior.
Provider-specific refresh remains optional adapter behavior.
Checked-in full-history evidence is not the default persistence layer.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: Default refresh state is open and default limit is product-owned, not inherited from prior evidence.
Ordinary refresh writes local ignored cache unless explicitly asked to write the legacy checked path.
open_questions_to_close: How should existing absent-cache summary behave?
validation_commands: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_workspace_summary_cli.py tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py -q
uv run ruff check src tests
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Refresh defaults no longer inherit state=all/limit from previous evidence.
Default refresh output path is ignored/local cache.
Tracked external-intent-evidence snapshot is removed from the repo.
Tests cover default cache write and missing gh fallback.

execution_run.executor: Codex with two read-only subagent reviews
execution_run.what happened: Default GitHub external intent refresh now writes ignored local cache, no longer inherits previous all-history audit scope, removes the checked-in evidence snapshot, and lets reconcile/report section reconstruct cache when gh is available while falling back cleanly when it is not.
execution_run.scope touched: workspace CLI external intent adapter, planning evidence loader, docs/contracts/tests, ignore rules, and planning state
execution_run.changed surfaces: removed tracked .agentic-workspace/planning/external-intent-evidence.json; added cache storage semantics to existing commands/contracts

(passed); uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json (healthy); uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success (passed); uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py (passed); uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success (passed)
execution_run.result for continuation: #536 complete; #537 remains next in reconstructable-artifact-policy lane

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; no mandatory GitHub dependency was added to core planning
finished_run_review.intent served: yes; raw external issue snapshots are no longer tracked durable state by default
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: medium-low; explicit legacy planning storage remains for compatibility but is ignored by git

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Treat external intent evidence as reconstructable cache, not checked-in state.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Preserve only context that is expensive to rediscover and necessary for safe continuation.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Does external issue evidence stop adding durable product residue?
